pre_command.description: Execute external commands before the action like command, file, http, and github_content. If it fails, docfresh fails and the action isn't run. The command and output are outputted to the console but the result isn't affected to the document. This is used for setup and checking the requirement

post_command.description: Execute external commands after the action like command, file, http, and github_content. If it fails, docfresh fails. The command and output are outputted to the console but the result isn't affected to the document. This is used for testing the action result and cleaning up. post_command is run even if pre_command and action fail.

command.description: Execute the external command and embed the result to documents

file.description: Read a local file and embed the content to documents

http.description: Call a HTTP request and embed the response to documents

github_content.description: Fetch a file by GitHub Contents API and embed it into documents

use_fenced_code_block_for_output.description: If this is true, the content is wrapped using markdown's fenced code block

details_tag.description: Wrap the output in an HTML details tag

command.description: The content of executed script. Either command or script is required

script.description: The file path to executed script. It's an absolute path or relative path from the current file. Either command or script is required

dir.description: The directory path where commands are executed. It's an absolute path or relative path from the current file. The default value is the directory where the current file is located

test.description: Expr script to test the result of command. The evaluation result must be a boolean. If the evaluation result is false, docfresh fails

script_language.description: Language of script. This is used for markdown's fenced code block. This is automatically detected in some languages such as Go and Python

timeout.description: The timeout of command. By default, there is no timeout. If timeout is exceeded, the signal SIGINT is sent to the process.

timeout_sigkill.description: If this timeout is exceeded, the signal SIGKILL is sent to the process. The default value is 1000 hours, meaning SIGKILL isn't sent usually, so the process should be terminated gracefully by SIGINT.

shell.description: The command executing command or script. If command is set, the default value is 'bash -c'. If script is set, the default value is decided by script's file extension

envs.description: Pairs of environment variable names and values

ignore_fail.description: If this is true, docfresh does't fail even if command fails

embed_script.description: If this is true, the content of script is embedded into documents.

quiet.description: If this is true, the command output isn't outputted to documents.

summary.description: The summary text. Defaults: 'Output' for commands, file path for file, URL for http, '<owner>/<repo>/<ref>/<path>' for github_content.

path.description: The file path. It's an absolute path or relative path from the current file.

range.description: Extract a specific range of lines from the file. Uses 0-based indexing with half-open interval [start, end). Negative values count from the end.

template.description: If this is set, the file is rendered as template rather than plain text.

test.description: Expr script to test the file content. The evaluation result must be a boolean. If the evaluation result is false, docfresh fails

ref.description: The ref (branch, tag, SHA). The default branch is used by default.

path.description: The path of GitHub Contents API

range.description: Extract a specific range of lines from the content. Uses 0-based indexing with half-open interval [start, end). Negative values count from the end.

template.description: If this is set, the file content is rendered as template rather than plain text.

test.description: Expr script to test the file content. The evaluation result must be a boolean. If the evaluation result is false, docfresh fails

range.description: Extract a specific range of lines from the response. Uses 0-based indexing with half-open interval [start, end). Negative values count from the end.

template.description: If this is set, the response body is rendered as template rather than plain text.

test.description: Expr script to test the response. The evaluation result must be a boolean. If the evaluation result is false, docfresh fails

timeout.description: HTTP request timeout (seconds). The default value is 5 seconds. If the value is negative, timeout isn't set

start.description: Start line number (0-based, inclusive). Default: 0. Negative values count from the end.

end.description: End line number (0-based, exclusive). Default: total line count. Negative values count from the end.

path.description: The file path. It's an absolute path or relative path from the current file.

vars.description: Variables which are passed to template. They can be referred in templates as .Vars.<variable name>

delims.description: The delimiters. The default delimiters are '{{' and '}}'

vars.description: Variables which are passed to template. They can be referred in templates as .Vars.<variable name>

delims.description: The delimiters. The default delimiters are '{{' and '}}'
